title: Hypixel SkyBlock Modpack
body:
## Skyblock Made Easy: Modpack for easier gameplay on Hypixel Skyblock
![Available On Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5f2bbe24d378d863f70c8b4bf7bf9c0ef2b56f7.png) ![Noavailable On Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eac87b58331af401c559133e1438798e88a55d6.png)

**Do you want to progress faster on Hypixel Skyblock, but don't want to spend hours farming?** This modpack is for you! It was created to make your gameplay easier and allow you to focus on what you really love about Skyblock - **building, trading, and exploring.**

**What does this modpack offer?**

* **Fast travel:** Teleports to important locations on the map to save time and energy.
* **Convenient features:** Item price information, automatic equipment sorting, and many other conveniences.
* **Additional features:** recipes list and more.

**This modpack is the perfect solution for:**

* **New players:** Quickly master the basics of the game and start enjoying more advanced gameplay.
* **Experienced players:** Optimize your time and focus on more challenging aspects of the game.
* **Players looking for ease:** You don't have to spend hours farming to achieve your goals.
